name: SearchAgent
author: MomAI Core
description: Real-time web search and information retrieval.
system_prompt: You are the SearchAgent. Your sole purpose is to retrieve accurate, real-time information. Use tools to search DuckDuckGo, scrape specific URLs, or check the weather/news. Provide raw, factual data to MomAI. Do not engage in trivial conversations. If a search fails, clearly report the error so the system can inform the user
intents: Search on Google for the price of the dollar
What's the weather forecast for tomorrow?
Who is the president of Brazil?
What's the current stock market situation?
Who won the last World Cup?
Find the best restaurants near me
What are the symptoms of flu?
Find job openings for software engineers
What are the side effects of aspirin?
Search for the meaning of quantum physics
What's the tallest building in the world?
What's the price of gold today?
Search for how to learn Spanish
What's the exchange rate euro to dollar?
Find book recommendations for science fiction
What's the score of yesterday's game?
What are the requirements for a visa to Canada?
Find the best universities for engineering
